title: Order of trial of cases
doc_html:
§1303.  Order of trial of cases

The judges of the civil district court by rule shall prescribe the order of preference for the trial of all cases filed therein.

Acts 2006, No. 621, §19(A), eff. Jan. 1, 2009; Acts 2008, No. 675, §1, eff. July 1, 2008; Acts 2008, No. 873, §1, eff. July 9, 2008; Acts 2011, No. 340, §2, eff. June 29, 2011; Acts 2012, No. 474, §4(B)(2).
